wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the HappiMynd mobile mental health application project overview. Explain its purpose as an integrated mental health and wellness platform providing screening tools, therapy sessions, educational content, and community support services. Document the application's mission to improve mental health accessibility through technology. Describe the target audience including individuals seeking mental health support, therapists, and healthcare professionals. Include the application's core value propositions, key features, and differentiation factors in the mental health tech space. Provide an architectural overview showing how the React Native + Expo framework enables cross-platform deployment. Document the business model, monetization strategy, and growth objectives. Include market positioning, competitive landscape analysis, and regulatory considerations for mental health applications.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication Flow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the authentication flow system in HappiMynd. Document the complete user journey from initial login to authenticated state, including form validation, error handling, and success redirection. Explain the integration between UI components and context providers during authentication. Detail the state management flow using authReducer for maintaining authentication status across the application. Document the userLogin function implementation, token handling, and AsyncStorage integration for persistent authentication. Include code examples showing the authentication handler functions, state updates, and navigation triggers. Address common authentication scenarios like invalid credentials, network errors, and session timeouts. Provide troubleshooting guidance for authentication failures and user experience considerations for smooth authentication flows.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiLIFE - Screening Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the HappiLIFE screening module, the mental health awareness and assessment component of HappiMynd. Document the screening assessment workflow including initial contact verification, questionnaire administration, and result interpretation. Explain the assessment types available (depression, anxiety, stress, etc.) and their scoring algorithms. Detail the user journey from screening initiation to report generation and recommendation delivery. Document the integration with healthcare professionals for follow-up care. Explain the privacy and security measures for sensitive health data. Include the reporting system that generates personalized mental health insights and recommendations. Address the compliance requirements for medical screening applications and data retention policies. Document the integration with external healthcare systems and referral pathways.

wiki_catalogs.name: State Management Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for HappiMynd's state management architecture using React Context and useReducer hooks. Explain the Provider pattern implementation with Hcontext.js as the central state container. Document the multi-reducer architecture including authReducer for authentication state, snackReducer for notifications, whiteLabelReducer for brand customization, and happiSelfReducer for self-help module state. Detail the state initialization patterns, reducer functions, and dispatch mechanisms. Explain how components consume context using useContext hook and how state updates trigger re-renders. Include examples of state mutations, action creators, and state selectors. Document the integration with AsyncStorage for persistent state, error boundary handling, and state debugging strategies. Address performance considerations with memoization and state normalization patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Android Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive Android integration documentation for HappiMynd's Android platform implementation. Document the MainActivity configuration including React Native bridge setup, activity lifecycle management, and intent handling. Explain the MainApplication setup with React Native initialization, Flipper debugging integration, and SSL pinning factory implementation. Detail the Android manifest configuration including permissions for camera, microphone, storage, and network access. Document the Google Services integration for Firebase and analytics services. Cover the Gradle build configuration including dependencies, signing configurations, and build variants. Explain the debug and release build processes, ProGuard/R8 configuration, and APK generation. Include Android-specific security implementations, SSL pinning setup, and certificate handling. Address troubleshooting common Android build issues, permission-related problems, and runtime errors. Document the integration with Android-specific native modules and third-party SDKs.

wiki_catalogs.name: Design System & Tokens
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the HappiMynd design system and design tokens. Document the color palette system including primary, secondary, and semantic colors with accessibility contrast ratios. Detail the typography scale covering font families, sizes, weights, and line heights. Explain the spacing system with consistent margin and padding scales. Document the component variant system including size variations, color variants, and state variants. Include the iconography system, brand assets, and visual identity guidelines. Provide design token specifications for themes, breakpoints, and responsive design. Document the design system implementation patterns and how components consume design tokens. Include guidelines for maintaining design consistency across the application.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for HappiMynd's authentication endpoints. Document login, registration, verification, and password reset endpoints with HTTP methods, URL patterns, request/response schemas, and authentication requirements. Detail the JWT token-based authentication system including token acquisition, refresh mechanisms, and expiration handling. Include request/response examples for user registration, email verification, phone verification, and password management. Document error response formats, validation rules, and security considerations. Explain the integration with AsyncStorage for token persistence and the global token caching mechanism. Address common authentication scenarios, token lifecycle management, and session handling patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Screening Assessment Workflow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the screening assessment workflow component. Document the complete assessment process from initiation to completion, including questionnaire administration, scoring algorithms, and result processing. Explain the different assessment types available (depression, anxiety, stress, etc.) and their respective questionnaires. Detail the user interface components used for assessment display, response collection, and progress tracking. Document the real-time scoring mechanism and how assessment results are calculated and validated. Include the completion flow that leads to report generation and next steps. Address the integration with authentication state to ensure proper user progression through the assessment process.

wiki_catalogs.name: Dashboard and Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the HappiSELF dashboard and overview interface. Document the main landing page layout, subscription status display, and navigation flow to different sections. Explain the subscription verification process using getSubscriptions() API and how the UI adapts based on user subscription status. Detail the header component integration, responsive design implementation using react-native-responsive-screen, and the overall visual hierarchy. Document the button states (Subscribed vs Get HappiSELF Now) and their navigation behaviors. Include the analytics integration for screen traffic tracking and the modal system for future feature announcements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Context Provider Setup
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Hcontext provider setup in HappiMynd's state management architecture. Explain the Provider pattern implementation using React.createContext() and the Hprovider component structure. Document the initialization of multiple reducers including authState, whiteLabelState, happiSelfState, and snackState. Detail the state variable declarations for device tokens, notifications, voice analysis, and filter configurations. Explain the useEffect cleanup patterns for Firebase Cloud Messaging listeners and proper resource management. Include examples of provider configuration, context consumption patterns, and error boundary handling. Document the integration with AsyncStorage for persistent state management and the overall architecture benefits of centralized state management.

wiki_catalogs.name: HTTP Client Configuration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Axios HTTP client configuration used in HappiMynd. Detail the apiClient.js setup including baseURL configuration from environment variables, timeout settings for preventing hanging requests, and instance creation patterns. Document the base URL configuration in config/index.js and how it integrates with different environments (development, staging, production). Explain the client initialization process, default headers configuration, and timeout handling mechanisms. Include examples of client instantiation, configuration options, and environment-specific settings. Address the relationship between the HTTP client and the broader application architecture, including how it integrates with the context provider system.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiLIFE Screening API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for HappiLIFE screening service endpoints. Document the assessment creation workflow including questionnaire submission, scoring algorithms, and report generation. Detail the screening completion endpoints, contact verification APIs, and report download mechanisms. Include authentication requirements for screening access, data validation rules for assessment responses, and response schemas for screening results. Document the integration with subscription management for accessing screening reports and the analytics endpoints for tracking screening engagement metrics.

wiki_catalogs.name: Audio Tasks
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Audio Task component within HappiSELF. Detail the audio recording functionality, playback controls, and voice analysis features. Document the microphone permissions handling, recording quality settings, and audio file management. Explain the integration with voice analysis APIs for speech pattern assessment. Include the user interface components for recording, preview, and submission. Document error handling for audio device access and recording failures. Provide examples of audio task configurations and validation rules for completed recordings.

wiki_catalogs.name: Voice Analysis API Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for the Sonde voice analysis service integration. Document the OAuth2 authentication flow for obtaining access tokens, user identifier registration process, and signed URL generation for secure audio uploads. Detail the complete voice analysis workflow including audio recording capture, presigned URL upload process, asynchronous inference requests, and report retrieval. Include endpoint specifications for /platform/v1/oauth2/token, /platform/v2/users, /platform/v1/storage/files, and /platform/async/v1/inference/voice-feature-scores. Document request/response schemas for user profiles, audio metadata, inference parameters, and scoring results. Explain the voice feature analysis metrics including Smoothness, Liveliness, Control, Energy Range, Clarity, Crispness, Pause Duration, and Speech Rate. Address error handling strategies, retry mechanisms, and data privacy compliance for audio processing.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication Reducer
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the authReducer implementation in HappiMynd's authentication system. Document the initialAuthState structure including isLogged, isGuest, selectedLanguage, user, isOnBoarded, feedbackSubmitted, isScreeningComplete, isAnyScreeningComplete, and userType properties. Detail all action types: LOGIN for user authentication with token injection, SIGNUP for new user registration, FEEDBACK for feedback submission tracking, LANGUAGE_SELECTION for language preferences, ON_BOARDING_PROCESS for onboarding completion, USER_UPDATE for profile modifications, COMPLETE_SCREENING and ANY_COMPLETE_SCREENING for screening status management, and LOGOUT for session termination. Explain the reducer's state mutation patterns, token management through global.authToken, and integration with the API client. Include examples of action creators, state selectors, and common authentication workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for the HappiMynd development environment setup. Document prerequisite software requirements including Node.js, npm/yarn, Xcode (for iOS), Android Studio, and Expo CLI. Provide step-by-step installation instructions for both development environments with platform-specific considerations. Include detailed setup for iOS simulator and Android emulator configuration. Document the project initialization process, dependency installation using yarn, and initial build procedures. Explain the development workflow including hot reloading, debugging setup, and testing strategies. Cover essential development tools like React Native Debugger, Flipper, and Expo Dev Client. Include troubleshooting common setup issues, environment variable configuration, and initial project structure navigation. Provide guidance on code formatting standards, linting setup, and development best practices.

wiki_catalogs.name: Verification System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the multi-layered verification system in HappiMynd. Detail the email verification process using SendEmailOtp component, phone OTP verification via SendPhoneOtp, and manual code verification through VerifyOtp component. Document the verification workflow from initial registration through account activation. Explain the OTP generation, delivery mechanisms, and validation logic. Include implementation details for time-based OTP expiration, retry limits, and resend functionality. Document the integration between verification components and the authentication context. Address security considerations including OTP entropy, rate limiting, and fraud prevention measures. Provide examples of verification state management and error handling for failed verifications. Include troubleshooting guidance for common verification issues like delivery failures and expired codes.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiGUIDE - Professional Guidance Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the HappiGUIDE professional guidance module, which connects users with certified mental health professionals. Document the professional matching algorithm and user-professional communication workflows. Explain the booking system for guidance sessions including scheduling, cancellation, and rescheduling policies. Detail the professional verification and credentialing processes. Document the session management system including pre-session preparation, session conduct, and post-session follow-up. Explain the integration with video conferencing platforms and secure communication channels. Address the professional liability insurance and compliance requirements. Document the rating and review system for professionals. Include the emergency response protocols and crisis intervention procedures. Explain the telehealth regulations compliance and geographic restrictions for professional services.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for HappiMynd's API integration patterns using Axios HTTP client. Document the apiClient.js configuration including base URL setup, request/response interceptors, token injection mechanisms, and error handling strategies. Explain the authentication flow with bearer token management, automatic token refresh, and logout procedures. Detail the API endpoint patterns for authentication, user management, service booking, content delivery, and real-time features. Document request/response transformation, data serialization, and error response handling. Include examples of API calls, parameter validation, and response processing. Address network error handling, retry mechanisms, and offline fallback strategies. Document the integration with external services like Sonde Voice Analysis API and payment gateways. Explain API versioning, rate limiting, and security considerations including CORS configuration and SSL pinning.

wiki_catalogs.name: iOS Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive iOS integration documentation for HappiMynd's iOS platform implementation. Document the AppDelegate configuration including React Native bridge setup, application lifecycle management, and scene delegate handling. Explain the Swift/Objective-C bridging header setup for native module integration. Detail the Info.plist configuration including app permissions for camera, microphone, photos, and background modes. Document the entitlements configuration for push notifications, background processing, and app-specific capabilities. Cover the CocoaPods dependency management including Podfile setup, dependency resolution, and workspace configuration. Explain the Xcode project configuration including build settings, signing certificates, and provisioning profiles. Document the iOS-specific security implementations, keychain integration, and biometric authentication setup. Address troubleshooting common iOS build issues, simulator/emulator problems, and device deployment challenges. Include the integration with iOS-specific native modules and third-party frameworks.

wiki_catalogs.name: Common Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the common components used throughout the HappiMynd application. Document the Header component including navigation patterns, branding elements, and responsive behavior. Explain the CustomDrawer implementation for main navigation with route protection and user context integration. Detail the Snack notification system for user feedback and error handling. Document the Capsule component for status indicators and badges. Explain the Chat component for real-time messaging functionality. Cover the ParentOtp component for parental verification workflows. Document the SocialMedia component for social sharing and connectivity features. Include component props, styling options, accessibility features, and integration patterns with the overall navigation system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Service Modules API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for HappiMynd's service module endpoints covering HappiLIFE screening, HappiLEARN education, HappiSELF self-help, HappiTALK therapy, and HappiVOICE voice analysis services. Document all CRUD operations for each service module including assessment creation, content retrieval, booking management, and progress tracking. Detail the endpoint schemas for screening questionnaires, educational content catalogs, self-help tasks, therapy session scheduling, and voice analysis reports. Include authentication requirements, request validation rules, and response formatting standards. Document the integration patterns between service modules and explain how endpoints interact to provide seamless user experiences across different mental health services.

wiki_catalogs.name: Report Generation System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the report generation and management system. Detail how personalized mental health reports are created from assessment data, including report templates, formatting, and content customization. Document the report types available (awareness summaries, detailed assessments, recommendations) and their specific content structures. Explain the integration with healthcare professional recommendations and follow-up care pathways. Detail the report storage, retrieval, and sharing mechanisms. Document the analytics dashboard that shows report history and trends over time. Include the export functionality and data privacy measures for sensitive health information.

wiki_catalogs.name: Task Management and Activities
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the task management and activity system within HappiSELF. Document the task selection interface, task execution workflow, and progress tracking mechanisms. Explain the different task types including AudioTask, VideoTask, MCQTask, TextTask, and other interactive activities. Detail the task navigation system, completion validation, and scoring mechanisms. Document the task header component for progress indication and user feedback. Include the integration with the course enrollment system and how tasks contribute to course completion. Explain the adaptive difficulty levels and personalized task recommendations based on user progress.

wiki_catalogs.name: Reducer Implementations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for all reducer implementations in HappiMynd's state management system. Document the authReducer for authentication state management including login, logout, and user profile operations. Explain the snackReducer for notification and snack bar state handling. Detail the whiteLabelReducer for brand customization and theme management. Cover the happiSelfReducer for self-help module state including task progress, course completion, and activity tracking. For each reducer, document the initial state structure, action types, reducer functions, and state update patterns. Include examples of action creators, state selectors, and common usage patterns. Explain state normalization techniques and how reducers handle asynchronous operations through API integration.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication & Token Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the authentication and token management system in HappiMynd's API integration. Document the request interceptor implementation that handles bearer token injection, including token retrieval from global state, AsyncStorage fallback, and token caching mechanisms. Explain the multi-source token lookup strategy (global.authToken, authState.user.access_token, AsyncStorage USER data). Detail the token injection process into Authorization headers and the logging mechanisms for debugging authentication flows. Document the response interceptor error handling for authentication failures, token expiration scenarios, and unauthorized access responses. Include examples of token lifecycle management, automatic token refresh patterns, and logout procedures that clear stored tokens.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiLEARN Education API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for HappiLEARN educational content service endpoints. Document content catalog retrieval, search functionality, and content filtering APIs. Detail the course enrollment endpoints, progress tracking mechanisms, and content consumption analytics. Include authentication requirements for accessing premium content, content metadata schemas, and search query parameter specifications. Document the integration patterns for content recommendations, favorites management, and completion tracking endpoints.

wiki_catalogs.name: Video Tasks
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the Video Task component in HappiSELF. Document the video recording capabilities, camera permissions, and video quality settings. Explain the video capture workflow, preview functionality, and upload mechanisms. Detail the integration with camera APIs and video processing features. Include the user interface for recording controls, timer display, and recording status indicators. Document error handling for camera access issues and video encoding problems. Provide examples of video task configurations and completion criteria for submitted videos.

wiki_catalogs.name: Firebase Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for Firebase integration patterns used in HappiMynd. Document the Firebase configuration setup, authentication mechanisms, real-time database operations, and push notification services. Explain the integration of Firebase Cloud Firestore for data storage, Firebase Authentication for user management, and Firebase Cloud Messaging for real-time notifications. Detail the implementation of real-time chat functionality, document synchronization, and user session management through Firebase services. Include configuration examples, initialization patterns, and security rule implementations. Document the integration with Firebase Analytics for user behavior tracking and Firebase Crashlytics for error reporting. Address authentication state management, offline data persistence, and real-time data synchronization patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Notification Reducer
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the snackReducer responsible for managing notification and snack bar state in HappiMynd. Document the initial state structure for notification messages, types, and display controls. Explain action types for showing notifications, updating message content, changing notification types (success, error, warning, info), and dismissing notifications. Detail the reducer's role in coordinating with the Snack component system and how it integrates with the overall notification architecture. Include examples of notification triggers, message formatting, auto-dismiss functionality, and common notification patterns used throughout the application.

wiki_catalogs.name: Architecture Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create architectural documentation for the HappiMynd application system design. Describe the high-level React Native + Expo architecture with component-based design patterns. Document the Provider Pattern implementation for centralized state management through Hcontext. Explain the multi-layered architecture including presentation layer (React components), business logic layer (context providers), data access layer (API clients), and integration layer (Firebase). Detail the navigation architecture using React Navigation with drawer, bottom tabs, and stack navigators. Document the modular service architecture with HappiLIFE, HappiGUIDE, HappiLEARN, HappiSELF, HappiTALK, HappiVOICE, and HappiBUDDY modules. Explain data flow patterns, component communication strategies, and state synchronization mechanisms. Include system boundaries, external integrations, and architectural decision rationales. Address scalability considerations, performance optimization strategies, and security architecture.

wiki_catalogs.name: Password Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the password management system in HappiMynd. Document the password reset workflow including forgot password initiation, email confirmation, and reset password completion. Explain the password change functionality for authenticated users with validation and security checks. Detail the password policy enforcement including minimum length, character requirements, and complexity rules. Document the secure transmission of password reset tokens and their expiration handling. Include implementation details for password hashing, salt generation, and secure storage practices. Address common password-related scenarios such as weak passwords, password reuse detection, and account lockout mechanisms. Provide examples of password validation logic and error handling strategies. Include security best practices for password management and user experience considerations for password recovery flows.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiLEARN - Educational Content Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the HappiLEARN educational content module, the learning and knowledge platform within HappiMynd. Document the content categorization system including mental health topics, coping strategies, and educational resources. Explain the content discovery mechanisms including search functionality, category browsing, and personalized recommendations. Detail the content consumption workflows including article reading, video viewing, and interactive modules. Document the progress tracking system for completed courses and learning achievements. Explain the content curation process and quality assurance for educational materials. Address the licensing and copyright considerations for educational content. Document the integration with external educational resources and partnerships. Include the accessibility features for diverse learning needs and disabilities. Explain the content moderation and safety measures for educational materials.

wiki_catalogs.name: Firebase Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for HappiMynd's Firebase integration covering real-time features, push notifications, and cloud storage. Document the Firebase SDK initialization, configuration, and service setup including messaging, storage, and authentication. Explain the push notification implementation with FCM integration, token management, and notification handling. Detail the real-time data synchronization patterns, Firestore integration for dynamic content, and cloud storage for media files. Document the notification system including foreground/background notification handling, deep linking, and user engagement tracking. Include examples of Firebase authentication flows, real-time database queries, and storage operations. Address security rules, data indexing, and performance optimization. Explain the integration with Expo Push Notifications and cross-platform notification strategies. Document troubleshooting common Firebase integration issues and monitoring approaches.

wiki_catalogs.name: Build and Deployment
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive build and deployment documentation for HappiMynd's multi-platform build system and deployment pipeline. Document the EAS Build configuration including build profiles, environment variables, and automated build processes. Explain the Expo configuration in app.json including app metadata, build settings, and platform-specific configurations. Detail the package.json scripts and dependencies for development, build, and release processes. Document the Google Services configuration for both development and production environments. Cover the build scripts including Expo module patching, Gradle modifications, and notification service integration. Explain the deployment strategies for both app stores including preparation of assets, signing certificates, and submission processes. Address continuous integration and delivery workflows, automated testing integration, and release management. Include troubleshooting build failures, dependency conflicts, and deployment issues across both platforms.

wiki_catalogs.name: Button Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the button component family in HappiMynd. Document the base Button component with its core functionality, styling variants, and interaction patterns. Explain the CategoryButton for service selection with visual categorization and selection states. Detail the FilterButton implementation for search and filtering interfaces. Document the OutineButton variant for secondary actions with transparent backgrounds. Explain the RadioButton component for single selection scenarios. Cover the WaveButton and WaveIconButton variants with animated effects and micro-interactions. Include component props, event handlers, accessibility considerations, and usage guidelines for different contexts within the application.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payment Integration API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for HappiMynd's payment processing endpoints and integration with payment gateways. Document subscription management, credit purchases, and transaction processing endpoints with HTTP methods, URL patterns, and request/response schemas. Detail the payment flow including cart management, checkout processes, and payment confirmation handling. Include integration with external payment processors, webhook handling for payment events, and error scenarios. Document pricing endpoint schemas, discount application, and subscription renewal processes. Explain the security measures for payment data handling, PCI compliance considerations, and fraud prevention mechanisms. Address common payment scenarios, retry logic, and refund processing workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Contact Verification Process
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the contact verification process that ensures secure and authenticated user participation in screening activities. Document the verification methods used (phone OTP, email verification, etc.) and their implementation details. Explain the integration with authentication systems and how verified contacts enable access to screening tools. Detail the security measures implemented to protect user contact information and prevent unauthorized access. Document the fallback mechanisms for verification failures and retry processes. Include the compliance aspects of handling sensitive contact data and data retention policies for verification records.

wiki_catalogs.name: Course Enrollment and Learning
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the course enrollment and learning management system. Document the course catalog interface, subscription process for courses, and progress tracking mechanisms. Explain the SubCourses screen for browsing available courses and the LibrarySub screen for accessing enrolled courses. Detail the course completion criteria, milestone tracking, and certification processes. Document the integration with the broader HappiMynd ecosystem for course content delivery. Include the user progress visualization, completion badges, and learning path recommendations. Explain the relationship between individual tasks and course completion requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: State Persistence Strategies
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for state persistence strategies in HappiMynd's state management architecture. Explain the integration with AsyncStorage for persisting critical application state across app restarts. Document the state hydration process during app initialization and how different state slices are restored. Detail the token caching mechanism for authentication persistence and API client token injection. Explain the selective persistence approach where only essential state is persisted while volatile state remains in memory. Include examples of state serialization/deserialization patterns, error handling for corrupted storage data, and performance considerations for large state objects. Document the relationship between AsyncStorage and Redux-style state management patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Endpoint Patterns
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for HappiMynd's API endpoint patterns and service integration. Document the endpoint organization by service modules (HappiLIFE, HappiGUIDE, HappiLEARN, etc.) and how they map to the application's feature architecture. Explain the request/response patterns for authentication endpoints, user management operations, service booking workflows, content delivery mechanisms, and real-time feature endpoints. Detail the parameter validation strategies, data serialization approaches, and response processing patterns. Include examples of CRUD operations across different service modules, query parameter handling, and form data submission patterns. Document the integration patterns with external services like Sonde Voice Analysis API and payment gateway endpoints. Address endpoint versioning strategies and backward compatibility considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiSELF Self-Help API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for HappiSELF self-help service endpoints. Document task management APIs including task assignment, progress tracking, and completion validation. Detail the course enrollment system, library subscription endpoints, and task scheduling mechanisms. Include authentication requirements for task access, task response validation schemas, and progress update endpoints. Document the integration with meditation timers, audio task playback, and video content delivery systems. Cover the analytics endpoints for tracking user engagement with self-help activities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Interactive Task Types
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for interactive task types in HappiSELF including Multiple Choice Questions (MCQ), Short Answer, Text Input, Linear Scale, Checkboxes, and Matching tasks. Detail the question rendering, answer collection, and validation mechanisms for each task type. Document the user interface components for different input methods and response formats. Explain the scoring algorithms, correctness validation, and feedback mechanisms. Include examples of task configurations, branching logic based on answers, and adaptive difficulty adjustments. Document the integration with progress tracking and completion validation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Communication Platforms API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create API documentation for communication platform integrations including video calling services, chat platforms, and bot communication systems. Include endpoint specifications for chat room management, message broadcasting, and participant authentication. Document the bot assessment workflow including natural language processing integration, automated screening question delivery, and assessment result processing. Explain the webhook configurations for event-driven chat updates, real-time presence indicators, and session status notifications. Address security considerations for encrypted communications, participant verification, and data privacy compliance.

wiki_catalogs.name: White Label Reducer
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the whiteLabelReducer that manages brand customization and theme state in HappiMynd. Document the initial state structure for brand configurations, color schemes, logo settings, and custom styling options. Explain action types for applying brand themes, updating color palettes, configuring custom branding elements, and managing white-label configurations. Detail how this reducer integrates with the design system and theme provider components. Include examples of brand switching scenarios, theme customization workflows, and white-label deployment patterns used across different client implementations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive authentication system documentation for HappiMynd's user authentication and authorization framework. Document the complete authentication flow from registration through login verification. Explain the multi-factor authentication approach including email verification, phone OTP verification, and password reset mechanisms. Detail the JWT token-based authentication system with automatic token refresh and expiration handling. Document the user registration process including profile creation, consent agreements, and initial onboarding steps. Explain the session management strategy, automatic logout on security events, and device fingerprinting for fraud prevention.
