Document the integration with Firebase Authentication for real-time user state synchronization. Address common authentication scenarios, error handling strategies, and user experience considerations for authentication flows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Session Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the session management system in HappiMynd. Detail the JWT token-based authentication architecture including token generation, validation, and refresh mechanisms. Document the automatic token refresh functionality and expiration handling strategies. Explain the session persistence using AsyncStorage for maintaining user state across app restarts. Detail the authentication state management through authReducer including LOGIN, LOGOUT, and SESSION_EXPIRED actions. Document the integration with Firebase Authentication for real-time session synchronization and push notifications. Include implementation details for session timeout handling, automatic logout on security events, and concurrent session management. Address security measures such as device fingerprinting, IP tracking, and suspicious activity detection. Provide examples of session lifecycle management and error handling for expired or invalid sessions. Include troubleshooting guidance for session-related issues and best practices for secure session handling.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiSELF - Self-Help and Wellness Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the HappiSELF self-help and wellness module, the personal development and habit-building component of HappiMynd. Document the task-based learning system including daily challenges, weekly goals, and long-term wellness programs. Explain the course enrollment and completion tracking system. Detail the habit formation workflows and progress monitoring tools. Document the journaling and note-taking functionality for personal reflection and progress documentation. Explain the reward and motivation systems for completing tasks and achieving milestones. Address the personalization algorithms that adapt content based on user progress and preferences. Document the integration with wearable devices and health tracking applications. Include the community features for peer support and accountability. Explain the evidence-based therapeutic approaches incorporated into the self-help activities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Offline Persistence
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for HappiMynd's offline-first data persistence strategy using AsyncStorage and local state management. Document the AsyncStorage integration for caching user data, content, and preferences with automatic synchronization when online. Explain the offline data lifecycle including data fetching strategies, cache invalidation, and conflict resolution. Detail the useIsMounted hook implementation for preventing memory leaks during asynchronous operations. Document the data synchronization patterns between local cache and remote API, including optimistic updates and rollback mechanisms. Include examples of offline-capable components, data hydration on app launch, and background sync strategies. Address data consistency, cache warming, and performance optimization for large datasets. Explain the integration with React Navigation for offline-aware routing and the handling of network connectivity changes. Document debugging tools for offline scenarios and testing strategies for offline functionality.

wiki_catalogs.name: Input Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the input component suite in HappiMynd. Document the InputField base component with validation, error handling, and accessibility features. Explain the DropDown component for selection interfaces with dynamic options and custom rendering. Detail the Checkbox and MultiCheckbox implementations for boolean and multiple selection scenarios. Document the PhoneInputField with international phone number formatting and validation. Explain the SearchField component for filtering and discovery interfaces. Cover the OTP components (SendEmailOtp, SendPhoneOtp, VerifyOtp) for authentication workflows. Include component props, validation rules, state management, accessibility compliance, and integration with form libraries.

wiki_catalogs.name: Third-Party Integrations API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for HappiMynd's third-party service integrations including voice analysis APIs, Firebase services, and external communication platforms. Document the Sonde voice analysis API integration endpoints for speech processing, audio analysis, and report generation. Detail Firebase integration patterns for real-time messaging, push notifications, and data synchronization. Include webhook configurations for event-driven updates, real-time data streaming, and bi-directional communication. Document the integration endpoints for video calling services, chat platforms, and analytics providers. Explain the authentication and authorization mechanisms for third-party services, rate limiting considerations, and error handling strategies. Address data privacy compliance, secure communication protocols, and monitoring approaches for external service dependencies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Healthcare Professional Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the integration with healthcare professionals and referral systems. Detail how screening results are transmitted to healthcare providers and the secure communication channels used. Document the referral pathways that connect users with appropriate mental health services based on their assessment results. Explain the professional dashboard features that allow healthcare providers to view patient reports and manage follow-up care. Detail the privacy and security measures required for HIPAA compliance and data protection. Include the integration with external healthcare systems and electronic health record (EHR) platforms. Document the consent management system for sharing sensitive health information with professionals.

wiki_catalogs.name: Journaling and Reflection Tools
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the journaling and reflection tools within HappiSELF. Document the Notes screen for viewing and managing personal reflections, the AddNote interface for creating new journal entries, and the CompletedScreen for reviewing completed activities. Explain the note-taking workflow, content formatting options, and storage mechanisms. Detail the integration with mood tracking, habit logging, and progress monitoring features. Document the privacy controls for personal reflections and export capabilities. Include the relationship between journaling activities and therapeutic outcomes, including evidence-based approaches to reflective writing and self-awareness building.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component Integration Patterns
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for component integration patterns with HappiMynd's state management system. Explain how components consume context using the useContext hook and access state from the Hcontext provider. Document the useSelector pattern alternatives and custom hooks for accessing specific state slices. Detail the useDispatch pattern for triggering state updates and API calls through action dispatching. Include examples of component state mapping, selector optimization, and performance considerations with memoization. Explain the integration patterns for different component types including functional components, class components, and higher-order components. Document error handling strategies, loading states, and component lifecycle integration with the context provider.

wiki_catalogs.name: Error Handling & Network Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for error handling strategies and network management in HappiMynd's API integration. Document the response interceptor error handling implementation, including error categorization (network errors, HTTP status codes, validation errors), error message standardization, and user-friendly error presentation. Explain the retry mechanisms for transient network failures, timeout handling strategies, and offline fallback approaches. Detail the integration with snack notifications for user feedback, error logging patterns, and debugging capabilities. Document the handling of authentication-related errors, session expiration scenarios, and service unavailability situations. Include examples of error boundary implementations, graceful degradation patterns, and recovery strategies for failed API calls. Address performance considerations for error-prone operations and best practices for resilient API consumption.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiTALK Therapy API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for HappiTALK therapy service endpoints. Document booking management APIs including therapist availability, appointment scheduling, and cancellation workflows. Detail the video call initiation endpoints, payment processing integrations, and session management systems. Include authentication requirements for therapy sessions, booking validation rules, and real-time communication endpoints. Document the credit system APIs, payment gateway integrations, and session feedback collection mechanisms. Cover the analytics endpoints for tracking therapy session attendance and user engagement.

wiki_catalogs.name: Task Navigation and Workflow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the task navigation system and workflow management in HappiSELF. Document the TaskScreen component for displaying individual tasks, TaskSelector for course navigation, and TaskScreenHeader for progress indication. Explain the task sequencing logic, prerequisite validation, and course progression tracking. Detail the navigation controls, back/forward functionality, and bookmarking features. Document the integration with course enrollment systems and completion requirements. Include the user experience patterns for task switching, progress visualization, and completion validation. Explain the adaptive routing based on user performance and skill levels.

wiki_catalogs.name: Analytics and Tracking Services
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create documentation for analytics and tracking service integrations used for user behavior monitoring, performance analytics, and service usage tracking. Document the integration with analytics platforms for event tracking, user journey mapping, and conversion analytics. Detail the implementation of custom event logging, user session tracking, and feature usage analytics. Include configuration examples for analytics SDK initialization, event parameter formatting, and data privacy compliance. Document the integration patterns for crash reporting, performance monitoring, and A/B testing frameworks. Explain the data collection strategies for user engagement metrics, feature adoption rates, and service utilization patterns. Address GDPR compliance, data anonymization techniques, and opt-out mechanisms for user privacy protection.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiSelf Reducer
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the happiSelfReducer that manages state for the self-help module in HappiMynd. Document the initial state structure for task progress tracking, course completion status, activity logs, and user engagement metrics. Explain action types for updating task progress, marking courses as completed, logging user activities, managing subscription states, and tracking learning achievements. Detail the reducer's integration with the HappiSELF module components including task screens, course management, and progress tracking systems. Include examples of state updates during task completion, course enrollment, progress calculations, and common HappiSELF workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Service Modules
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for HappiMynd's seven core service modules that form the application's integrated mental health platform. Document each module's purpose, target users, and key functionality. Explain the modular architecture that allows independent development and deployment of service components. Detail the service discovery mechanism and how users navigate between different modules. Document the integration patterns between modules and shared resources. Explain the subscription and payment models for accessing premium features within each module. Include service availability, geographic restrictions, and compliance considerations for each module. Address the unified user experience across modules while maintaining specialized functionality. Document the backend integration patterns, API communication strategies, and data synchronization between modules.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiTALK - Therapy and Counseling Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the HappiTALK therapy and counseling module, the professional therapy session component of HappiMynd. Document the therapy session booking system including therapist selection, availability checking, and appointment scheduling. Explain the video session infrastructure including connection establishment, quality monitoring, and session recording capabilities. Detail the session management workflows including pre-session preparation, session conduct, and post-session follow-up. Document the credit system for therapy sessions and payment processing integration. Explain the therapist-student matching algorithm and compatibility factors. Address the telehealth platform compliance including HIPAA regulations and secure communication protocols. Document the session feedback and rating systems. Include the emergency protocols and crisis intervention procedures during virtual sessions. Explain the integration with electronic health records and therapy progress tracking.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Flow Patterns
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for HappiMynd's data flow patterns and state synchronization mechanisms. Document the unidirectional data flow architecture using Redux-like patterns with React Context. Explain the data lifecycle from user actions through context providers to API calls and state updates. Detail the integration patterns between different data sources including local AsyncStorage, remote APIs, and Firebase services. Document the state normalization strategies, data transformation pipelines, and caching mechanisms. Include examples of complex data flows such as user authentication, content loading, real-time updates, and form submissions. Address error propagation, loading states, and data validation throughout the flow. Explain the observer pattern implementation for real-time updates and the integration with React hooks for efficient re-rendering. Document performance optimization techniques including memoization, lazy loading, and data prefetching strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Card Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the card component family used throughout HappiMynd's content presentation. Document the BookingCard for service booking displays with status indicators and action buttons. Explain the CourseCard for educational content with progress tracking and completion states. Detail the DocumentCard for file and resource displays with download capabilities. Document the HappiLEARNCard for content discovery with metadata and engagement metrics. Explain the LockedBlogCard for premium content restriction and unlock mechanisms. Cover the NotificationCard for user activity and system alerts. Detail the OfferCard for promotional content and special deals. Document the PricingCard for subscription tiers and billing information. Include the remaining card types (AudioCard, BlogCard, CreditsCard) with their specific use cases and styling patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Configuration & Security
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for HappiMynd's API client configuration, security measures, and utility functions. Document the axios configuration including base URL settings, timeout parameters, and interceptor implementations for request/response handling. Detail the authentication token injection mechanism, global state management, and AsyncStorage integration for persistent token storage. Explain the error handling strategies, logging mechanisms, and debugging approaches for API interactions. Document the security measures including token validation, request signing, and data encryption protocols. Include configuration options for different environments (development, staging, production), proxy settings, and network optimization techniques. Address API performance monitoring, caching strategies, and rate limiting implementations. Provide troubleshooting guides for common API connectivity issues and security-related problems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Rewards and Motivation System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the rewards and motivation system within HappiSELF. Document the credit-based reward mechanism, achievement tracking, and gamification elements. Explain the CreditsCard component for displaying user progress and rewards. Detail the milestone-based motivation system, streak maintenance features, and behavioral reinforcement techniques. Document the integration with habit formation algorithms and positive reinforcement strategies. Include the social aspects of motivation through peer comparison and community achievements. Explain the psychological principles behind the reward system and how it supports long-term engagement with self-help activities.

wiki_catalogs.name: External Service Integrations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for external service integrations within HappiMynd's API architecture. Document the integration patterns with third-party services including the Sonde Voice Analysis API, payment gateway integrations, and push notification services. Explain the API key management, service-specific authentication mechanisms, and data exchange protocols. Detail the VoiceAPIService implementation for voice analysis workflows, including file upload handling, processing status monitoring, and report retrieval. Document the integration with Firebase services for real-time features, chat functionality, and notification systems. Include examples of webhook handling, service health monitoring, and fallback strategies for external service failures. Address security considerations for external integrations, data privacy compliance, and service-level error handling. Explain the coordination between internal API calls and external service interactions within the application's workflow.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiVOICE Voice Analysis API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for HappiVOICE voice analysis service endpoints. Document the voice recording upload endpoints, audio processing workflows, and analysis result generation APIs. Detail the report generation mechanisms, analysis wait status endpoints, and result download capabilities. Include authentication requirements for voice analysis access, audio file validation rules, and processing queue management. Document the integration with external voice analysis services, real-time processing status updates, and result interpretation endpoints. Cover the analytics endpoints for tracking voice analysis usage and improvement metrics.

wiki_catalogs.name: Course Completion and Assessment
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the course completion system and assessment mechanisms in HappiSELF. Document the CourseComplete screen functionality, completion criteria validation, and certification generation. Explain the scoring algorithms, minimum passing scores, and grade calculation methods. Detail the integration with course enrollment data and task completion tracking. Document the user interface for displaying completion status, earned badges, and next course recommendations. Include the backend integration for certificate generation and email notifications. Explain the retry mechanisms, remediation paths, and progress reset options for failed assessments.

wiki_catalogs.name: UI Components System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the HappiMynd UI component library and design system. Document the component architecture pattern with reusable, accessible, and responsive components. Explain the design system including color palettes, typography scales, spacing systems, and component variants. Detail the component categories including common components (Header, Drawer, Snack), interactive components (Buttons, Inputs, Modals), and content components (Cards, Lists, Forms). Document component props, events, styling options, and customization capabilities. Include accessibility guidelines, internationalization support, and responsive design patterns. Explain the component composition strategies, prop drilling avoidance, and state management integration. Document the design tokens system, theme customization, and brand consistency enforcement. Address component testing strategies, performance optimization, and maintenance best practices.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiVOICE - Voice Analysis Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the HappiVOICE voice analysis module, the speech and vocal assessment component of HappiMynd. Document the voice recording system including audio quality control, recording environment optimization, and technical specifications. Explain the voice analysis algorithms that detect emotional states, cognitive function, and speech patterns. Detail the report generation system that interprets analysis results and provides actionable insights. Document the integration with external voice analysis APIs and Sonde Services. Explain the user workflow from voice recording to comprehensive analysis report delivery. Address the privacy and security measures for audio data processing and storage. Document the clinical validation and accuracy metrics for voice analysis results. Include the interpretation guidelines for healthcare professionals and patients. Explain the subscription model for premium voice analysis features and report access.

wiki_catalogs.name: Modal Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the modal component system in HappiMynd. Document the modal architecture including overlay management, focus trapping, and keyboard navigation. Explain the CancelBookingModal for service cancellation workflows with confirmation patterns. Detail the ComingSoon modal for feature availability notifications. Document the ConcentModal for consent and agreement workflows. Explain the ConfidentialModal for sensitive information handling. Cover the CouponModal for promotional offers and discounts. Detail the CourseLockModal and CourseScoreModal for educational progress management. Document the DocumentUploadModal for file submission processes. Explain the ExitScreeningModal for assessment termination. Cover the LanguageModal for localization settings. Detail the LogoutModal for session termination. Document the remaining modal types (QueryModal, ReceiptModal, ReportGenConfirmModal, TimeSlot, UpgradeModal) with their specific workflows and user interaction patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data management documentation for HappiMynd's state management, API integration, and data persistence strategies. Document the Redux-like context provider architecture for centralized state management across multiple reducers. Explain the API client configuration with Axios, request/response interceptors, and error handling strategies. Detail the Firebase integration for real-time features, push notifications, and user data synchronization. Document the offline-first approach with AsyncStorage for data persistence and synchronization strategies. Explain the data flow patterns, state normalization, and cache management. Include data validation strategies, error boundary implementation, and data integrity measures. Document the integration with third-party services, analytics collection, and user preference management. Address data security, encryption at rest and in transit, and compliance with privacy regulations.

wiki_catalogs.name: HappiBUDDY - Peer Support Module
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the HappiBUDDY peer support module, the community and peer-to-peer support component of HappiMynd. Document the buddy matching algorithm that pairs users based on shared experiences, interests, and support needs. Explain the chat system including real-time messaging, group discussions, and community forums. Detail the support group management including topic moderation, member coordination, and activity facilitation. Document the anonymous support features and privacy controls for sensitive conversations. Explain the integration with crisis support resources and emergency assistance protocols. Address the community guidelines and content moderation policies for peer support interactions. Document the success metrics and outcomes tracking for peer support effectiveness. Include the training and certification programs for peer supporters and community moderators. Explain the integration with professional support services when peer support is insufficient.

wiki_catalogs.name: Notifier Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create documentation for the notifier component system used for contextual alerts and reminders in HappiMynd. Document the DiaryNotifies component for daily journal and habit tracking notifications. Explain the MessageNotifies component for messaging and communication alerts. Detail the MoodNotofies component for mood tracking and emotional well-being notifications. Document the SessionNotifies component for therapy session reminders and scheduling alerts. Include component implementation patterns, notification scheduling, user preference management, and integration with the application's reminder system. Explain how notifiers integrate with Firebase messaging and local notification services.

wiki_catalogs.name: Native Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive native integration documentation for HappiMynd's platform-specific implementations and native module integrations. Document the Android configuration including MainActivity setup, permissions handling, SSL pinning implementation, and Google Services integration. Explain the iOS configuration with AppDelegate setup, entitlements management, and CocoaPods dependency resolution. Detail the native module integrations for camera access, audio recording, video calling, and push notifications. Document the build configuration for both platforms including signing certificates, provisioning profiles, and app store deployment preparation. Explain the native bridge patterns for custom native modules and third-party SDK integration. Include platform-specific optimizations, performance considerations, and troubleshooting guides. Address code signing requirements, app store submission processes, and platform-specific security implementations.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Reference
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for HappiMynd's RESTful API endpoints and service integrations. Document all authenticated and public API endpoints with HTTP methods, URL patterns, request/response schemas, and authentication requirements. Detail the API versioning strategy, rate limiting policies, and error response formats. Explain the API client configuration including base URLs, timeout settings, and interceptor implementations. Document the integration endpoints for payment processing, voice analysis services, and third-party API connections. Include request/response examples, parameter validation rules, and common error scenarios. Detail the API security measures including token authentication, request signing, and data encryption. Document the webhook integration patterns for real-time notifications and event-driven updates. Address API performance optimization, caching strategies, and monitoring approaches.

wiki_catalogs.name: Testing and Deployment
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive testing and deployment documentation for HappiMynd's quality assurance and release management processes. Document the testing strategy including unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing approaches. Explain the test environment setup, mock data configuration, and automated testing pipelines. Detail the continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipeline configuration using EAS Build and Expo Application Services. Document the staging environment setup, beta testing distribution, and production release procedures. Include quality assurance processes, performance testing strategies, and security scanning implementation. Explain the app store submission process for both iOS App Store and Google Play Store including metadata management and compliance verification. Address rollback procedures, monitoring and alerting systems, and post-release maintenance activities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Troubleshooting Guide
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive troubleshooting documentation for common issues encountered during HappiMynd development, testing, and deployment phases. Document frequent build errors, dependency conflicts, and platform-specific issues with step-by-step resolution procedures. Explain debugging techniques for React Native applications including remote debugging, log analysis, and performance profiling. Detail common authentication issues, API connectivity problems, and Firebase integration challenges. Include troubleshooting guides for native module integration issues, permission-related problems, and platform-specific deployment failures. Document memory management issues, performance bottlenecks, and optimization strategies. Address user-reported issues, crash analysis, and error reporting mechanisms. Provide diagnostic tools, logging strategies, and escalation procedures for complex technical problems.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# HappiMynd: Comprehensive Mobile Mental Health Application

## Project Introduction

HappiMynd is a comprehensive mental health and wellness mobile application designed to provide users with integrated mental healthcare services through a unified platform. The application offers multiple specialized modules including screening tools, therapy sessions, educational content, and community support features.

### Purpose Statement
HappiMynd aims to democratize mental healthcare accessibility by providing a seamless digital platform that combines screening assessments, therapeutic interventions, educational resources, and peer support systems in a single mobile application.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Accessibility**: Make mental healthcare accessible to underserved populations through mobile-first approach
- **Comprehensive Care**: Integrate screening, therapy, education, and support services
- **Personalization**: Tailor mental health interventions based on individual needs and progress
- **Community Support**: Foster peer connections and reduce isolation among users

### Target Audience
- Individuals seeking mental health support and screening
- Users requiring therapy and counseling services
- People interested in mental wellness education and resources
- Caregivers and family members supporting loved ones with mental health challenges

## Technical Architecture

The application follows a modern React Native architecture with a robust state management system and modular component structure.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[App Entry Point] --> B[Context Provider]
    B --> C[Navigation Container]
    C --> D[Drawer Navigation]
    D --> E[Tab Navigation]
    E --> F[Main Screens]
    F --> G[Authentication Flow]
    F --> H[Service Modules]
    H --> I[HappiLIFE Screening]
    H --> J[HappiGUIDE]
    H --> K[HappiLEARN]
    H --> L[HappiSELF]
    H --> M[HappiTALK]
    H --> N[HappiVOICE]
    H --> O[HappiBUDDY]
    
    B --> P[API Client]
    B --> Q[Firebase Integration]
    B --> R[Async Storage]
    
    P --> S[RESTful API]
    Q --> T[Cloud Firestore]
    Q --> U[Firebase Messaging]
```

### Component Breakdown

The application is structured around several key architectural layers:

**Presentation Layer**: React Native components organized into reusable UI elements
**Business Logic Layer**: Context providers managing application state and business operations  
**Data Layer**: API clients and Firebase integration for data persistence and real-time features
**Infrastructure Layer**: Authentication, storage, and third-party service integrations

### Design Patterns

The application implements several key design patterns:

- **Provider Pattern**: Centralized state management through React Context
- **Repository Pattern**: Abstracted data access through API clients
- **Observer Pattern**: Real-time updates through Firebase and notification systems
- **Factory Pattern**: Dynamic component creation for different service modules

### System Relationships

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant App
    participant Context
    participant API
    participant Firebase
    
    User->>App: Login Request
    App->>Context: Authenticate User
    Context->>API: Validate Credentials
    API-->>Context: User Data
    Context->>Firebase: Setup Notifications
    Context-->>App: Authenticated State
    App-->>User: Dashboard Access
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points

**Application Entry Point** (`App.js`)
- Root component handling splash screen, font loading, and jailbreak detection
- Initializes the main application context provider
- Manages global state and navigation setup

**Main Screen Controller** (`src/screens/Main.js`)
- Orchestrates authentication flow and navigation routing
- Handles user validation and onboarding state management
- Implements floating action button for chat integration

### Core Modules

**Context Provider System** (`src/context/Hcontext.js`)
- Centralized state management with multiple reducers
- Authentication, snack notifications, white-labeling, and HappiSELF state
- Comprehensive API integration for all application services
- Firebase messaging and notification handling

**Configuration Management** (`src/config/index.js`)
- Base URL configuration for production and development environments
- Third-party service integration credentials
- Analytics and tracking configurations

**Navigation Architecture** (`src/routes/`)
- Drawer navigation for main app sections
- Bottom tab navigation for primary service modules
- Stack navigators for detailed service flows
- Route protection and authentication gating

### Configuration Approach

**Firebase Integration** (`src/context/Firebase.js`)
- Dual Firebase configuration for client and development environments
- Firestore database initialization with long-polling fallback
- Real-time database connectivity for chat and messaging features

**API Client Configuration** (`src/context/apiClient.js`)
- Axios-based HTTP client with automatic token injection
- Request/response interceptors for authentication and error handling
- Global token caching for improved performance

### External Dependencies

**Core Framework Dependencies**:
- React Native 0.64.4 with Expo 43.0.2
- React Navigation for multi-level navigation
- Async Storage for offline data persistence
- Firebase SDK for cloud services and real-time features

**Specialized Dependencies**:
- @react-native-firebase/messaging for push notifications
- expo-av for audio/video recording capabilities
- react-native-gifted-chat for messaging interface
- react-native-svg for custom graphics and animations

### Integration Points

**Authentication Flow** (`src/screens/Auth/`)
- Multi-step authentication process with email/phone verification
- Code-based authentication for guardian verification
- Social login integration capabilities

**Service Modules** (`src/screens/`)
- Modular service architecture allowing independent development
- Consistent UI patterns across all service offerings
- Progress tracking and completion monitoring

### Component Relationship Diagrams

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Auth Context] --> B[Auth Screens]
    A --> C[Protected Screens]
    B --> D[Login/Registration]
    B --> E[Verification]
    C --> F[Dashboard]
    C --> G[Services]
    F --> H[Navigation]
    G --> I[Service Modules]
    I --> J[HappiLIFE]
    I --> K[HappiGUIDE]
    I --> L[HappiLEARN]
    I --> M[HappiSELF]
    I --> N[HappiTALK]
    I --> O[HappiVOICE]
    I --> P[HappiBUDDY]
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

**Integrated Mental Health Platform**:
- Comprehensive screening tools for mental health assessment
- Personalized therapy and counseling services
- Educational content library with interactive learning modules
- Community support and peer connection features
- Progress tracking and wellness monitoring

**Multi-Service Architecture**:
- HappiLIFE: Mental health screening and awareness tools
- HappiGUIDE: Professional guidance and support services  
- HappiLEARN: Educational content and skill-building resources
- HappiSELF: Personal wellness tracking and self-care tools
- HappiTALK: Therapy sessions and professional counseling
- HappiVOICE: Voice analysis and speech-based assessment
- HappiBUDDY: Peer support and community connection

### Implementation Highlights

**Real-Time Communication** (`src/screens/Chat/`)
- Integrated chat system with psychologist matching
- Voice recording and analysis capabilities
- Video consultation scheduling and management
- Message queuing and delivery confirmation

**Progress Monitoring** (`src/screens/HappiSELF/`)
- Interactive task completion tracking
- Audio and video content consumption monitoring
- Personalized wellness journey documentation
- Achievement badges and milestone celebrations

**Service Discovery** (`src/screens/Individual/ExploreServices.js`)
- Comprehensive service catalog with filtering capabilities
- Subscription management and payment processing
- Availability booking and scheduling systems
- Service rating and feedback collection

### Feature Architecture Diagrams

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Onboarding
    Onboarding --> Authentication: Complete Profile
    Authentication --> Dashboard: Verified Account
    Dashboard --> ServiceSelection: Active User
    ServiceSelection --> ServiceModule: Choose Service
    ServiceModule --> ProgressTracking: Engaged User
    ProgressTracking --> ServiceSelection: Continue Journey
    ProgressTracking --> Dashboard: Complete Module
    Dashboard --> ServiceSelection: Continue Exploration
    Dashboard --> [*]: Inactive User
```

**Performance Optimization Features**:
- Lazy loading for resource-intensive components
- Image optimization and caching strategies
- Background processing for non-critical operations
- Memory management for long-running sessions

**Security and Compliance**:
- End-to-end encryption for sensitive communications
- HIPAA-compliant data handling practices
- User consent management and data privacy controls
- Secure authentication and authorization mechanisms

---

**Sources:**
- [package.json](package.json)
- [App.js](App.js)
- [src/screens/Main.js](src/screens/Main.js)
- [src/context/Hcontext.js](src/context/Hcontext.js)
- [src/config/index.js](src/config/index.js)
- [src/routes/DrawerNavigation/index.js](src/routes/DrawerNavigation/index.js)
- [src/routes/TabNavigation/index.js](src/routes/TabNavigation/index.js)
- [src/screens/Home/Home.js](src/screens/Home/Home.js)
- [src/screens/Auth/Login.js](src/screens/Auth/Login.js)
- [src/context/Firebase.js](src/context/Firebase.js)
- [src/context/apiClient.js](src/context/apiClient.js)
- [app.json](app.json)

</blog>
